basic_details.job_title: Army Station Bathinda Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Station Headquarters Cell Bathinda Military Station
basic_details.short_information: Station Headquarters Cell Bathinda Military Station has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Clerk Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 22-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation and Basic Computer Course/ Class-I clerical trade (Armed Force) with 5 Yrs work experience
qualification.details: Clerk: Graduation and Basic Computer Course/ Class-I clerical trade (Armed Force) with 5 Yrs work experience.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Station Bathinda Clerk Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Station Bathinda Clerk Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Army Station Bathinda Clerk recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Army Station Bathinda Clerk recruitment is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Clerk.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Clerk post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clerk post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Clerk post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is Graduation and a Basic Computer Course or Class-I clerical trade (Armed Force) with 5 years of work experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Clerk position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 19,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Clerk post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Scrutiny of Applications, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Army Station Bathinda Military Station located?
faq.answer: The Army Station Bathinda Military Station is located in Bathinda, Punjab, with the pincode 151001.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a Contractual job opportunity.
